description: Bot Improvements July 2026 - LLM bug fix, path command improvements, connectivity metrics, DM-based help, and fun commands based on community feedback

userStories.title: Fix LLM weather response bug - add tool execution logging
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to understand why LLM queries are returning weather data instead of LLM responses.
acceptanceCriteria: Add debug logging to tool_executor.py showing which tool is selected and why
Add debug logging to llm_command.py showing the query and response flow
Log the system prompt being sent to Ollama
Log when tools are invoked vs when direct LLM response is used
userStories.notes: Added debug logging to tool_executor.py, llm_command.py, and tool_registry.py. Pre-existing test failures unrelated to logging changes.

userStories.title: Fix LLM tool routing - prevent incorrect weather tool invocation
userStories.description: As a user, I want my !ask queries to return relevant LLM responses, not weather data.
acceptanceCriteria: Review tool_registry.py and tool_executor.py for routing logic
Ensure LLM only calls weather tool when query explicitly mentions weather
Add keyword filtering to prevent false positive tool matches
Test with query 'are dolphins intelligent' - should NOT return weather
Test with query 'what is the weather' - should return weather data
userStories.notes: Added keyword-based intent filtering to tool_registry.py. Tools are only offered to LLM when query contains relevant keywords. Pre-existing test failures unrelated to changes.

userStories.title: Add unit tests for LLM tool routing
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests to prevent future tool routing regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Test that non-weather queries don't invoke weather tool
Test that weather queries do invoke weather tool
Test edge cases: 'hot dog' should not trigger weather
userStories.notes: Created tests/test_tool_routing.py with 122 tests covering all tool routing scenarios. Coverage for tool_registry.py is 99%. Pre-existing test failure in test_tool_registry.py unrelated to new tests.

userStories.title: Add database migration for repeater advertisement tracking
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a table to store repeater advertisement observations for connectivity metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration in modules/db_migrations.py for repeater_adverts table
Table has columns: id, repeater_pubkey, repeater_name, observed_at, snr, rssi, hops
Create index on observed_at for time-based queries
Migration runs successfully when bot starts
userStories.notes: Created migration 15 (_m0015_repeater_adverts_table) with repeater_adverts table and indexes on repeater_pubkey and observed_at.

userStories.title: Capture repeater advertisements in message handler
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to record repeater adverts when they are received.
acceptanceCriteria: In message_handler.py, detect repeater advertisement packets
Extract repeater pubkey, name, SNR, RSSI, hops from advert
Handle duplicate adverts gracefully (allow multiple observations)
userStories.notes: Added _record_repeater_advert() method to message_handler.py. Inserts into repeater_adverts table after successful tracking. Includes 7 unit tests.

userStories.title: Create connectivity metrics calculation module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need functions to calculate mesh connectivity statistics.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement get_repeaters_known() - count total repeaters in contacts
Implement get_repeaters_heard(hours) - count repeaters with adverts in time window
userStories.notes: Created modules/connectivity_metrics.py with ConnectivityMetrics class. Implements all required functions with comprehensive docstrings. Also includes get_summary() convenience method.

userStories.title: Create health command plugin
userStories.description: As a user, I want to check mesh connectivity health with !health command.
acceptanceCriteria: Call connectivity_metrics functions to gather data
Format response: 'Mesh Health: X known / Y heard (48h) / Z heard (24h), N% connectivity'
Add [Health_Command] section to config.ini.example with enabled flag
userStories.notes: Created modules/commands/health_command.py with name='health', keywords=['health', 'connectivity']. Calls ConnectivityMetrics to gather data and formats response. Added [Health_Command] section to config.ini.example.

userStories.title: Add unit tests for connectivity metrics
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for the connectivity calculation functions.
acceptanceCriteria: Test get_repeaters_known() with empty and populated DB
Test get_repeaters_heard() with various time windows
Use tmp_path fixture for test database
userStories.notes: Created tests/test_connectivity_metrics.py with 29 tests covering all methods and edge cases. Uses tmp_path fixture for test database.

userStories.title: Add 1-byte path collision warning to path command
userStories.description: As a user, I want to know when path resolution may be unreliable due to hash collisions.
acceptanceCriteria: In path_command.py, detect when path uses 1-byte prefixes
Add warning symbol ⚠️ to output when 1-byte path detected
userStories.notes: Added _is_one_byte_path() method and show_collision_warning config option. Warning appended to _format_path_response() output. Pre-existing test failures in test_path_command_*.py unrelated.

userStories.title: Add location labels to path command output
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see geographic context in path responses like HA Relay does.
acceptanceCriteria: In path_command.py, look up location for first and last hop
Add location labels to output format: '[5h] (Leander→Austin) a1b2,c3d4...'
Use repeater contact data for location lookup
Fall back gracefully if location unknown
userStories.notes: Added _get_location_label() and _get_location_labels() methods. Updated _format_path_response() to include location labels. Added include_location_names config option. Pre-existing test failures in test_path_command_*.py unrelated.

userStories.title: Add public_channel_mode config to help command
userStories.description: As a bot operator, I want to configure how help responds on public channels.
acceptanceCriteria: Add public_channel_mode config option to [Help_Command] section
Update config.ini.example with new option and comments
userStories.notes: Added public_channel_mode config option with 'redirect', 'brief', 'full' values. Updated config.ini.example with documentation. Pre-existing test failure in test_help_command.py unrelated.

userStories.title: Implement help command redirect mode
userStories.description: As a user, I want help to tell me to DM the bot on public channels to reduce noise.
acceptanceCriteria: If 'redirect' and message is on channel, respond 'Send !help to me in a DM.'
If 'brief', send short list on channel + full via DM
DM sending uses existing send_dm() method
userStories.notes: Implemented _handle_general_help() with redirect/brief/full modes. DMs always get full help. Brief mode sends 5 commands on channel + full via DM. Pre-existing test failure in test_help_command.py unrelated.

userStories.title: Create ding command plugin
userStories.description: As a user, I want !ding to respond with 'Dong!' for fun.
acceptanceCriteria: Set name='ding', keywords=['ding'], description='Responds with Dong!'
Add [Ding_Command] section to config.ini.example with enabled and response options
userStories.notes: Created modules/commands/ding_command.py with configurable response. Added [Ding_Command] section to config.ini.example. Pre-existing test failures in test_path_command_*.py unrelated.

userStories.title: Add unit tests for ding command
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for the ding command.
userStories.notes: Created tests/commands/test_ding_command.py with 24 tests covering metadata, can_execute, execute, rate limiting, and config handling. Pre-existing test failures (23 tests) are unrelated.

userStories.title: Update documentation for new commands and features
userStories.description: As a user, I want documentation for the new health and ding commands.
acceptanceCriteria: Document public_channel_mode option for help command
Update README.md features list if needed
userStories.notes: Added !health command, !ding command, and help public_channel_mode to docs/command-reference.md. Added connectivity metrics to README.md features list and added health/ding to quick reference.

userStories.title: Create LLM SQL query tool with schema introspection
userStories.description: As an LLM, I need a tool to query the SQLite database directly so I can answer questions about repeaters, contacts, and mesh data without hardcoded limits.
acceptanceCriteria: Create modules/commands/sql_query_command.py as a new LLM-callable tool
Implement get_schema() method that returns all table DDL statements
Implement query(sql, limit) method that executes SELECT queries only
Add 'limit' parameter that LLM can specify (default 100, max 1000)
Include table DDL in tool description so LLM knows available schema
userStories.notes: Created modules/commands/sql_query_command.py with get_schema() and query() methods. Rejects INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DROP/ALTER/CREATE/TRUNCATE/PRAGMA. Limit parameter: default 100, max 1000. Added sql_query to available_tools in config.ini.example and TOOL_TRIGGER_KEYWORDS in tool_registry.py.

userStories.title: Add limit parameter to stats command for LLM flexibility
userStories.description: As an LLM, I need to specify my own limits when calling the stats command instead of using hardcoded values.
acceptanceCriteria: Add optional 'limit' parameter to stats command metadata
Update stats queries to use parameterized limit instead of hardcoded LIMIT 5/8/20
Default limit to reasonable value (20) when not specified
Cap maximum limit at 100 to prevent abuse
Update tool schema in parameters list with limit description
userStories.notes: Added limit parameter (default 20, max 100) to stats command. Updated all leaderboard queries to use parameterized limit. Pre-existing test failures (23 tests) are unrelated.

userStories.title: Create repeaters query tool for LLM
userStories.description: As an LLM, I need a dedicated tool to query repeater/contact data so I can answer questions like 'what are the closest repeaters'.
acceptanceCriteria: Create modules/commands/repeaters_command.py for LLM tool use
Query complete_contact_tracking table for repeater data
Support filtering by: is_repeater, has_location, distance from bot
Calculate distance from bot location when available
Return JSON-formatted data for LLM consumption
userStories.notes: Created modules/commands/repeaters_command.py with is_repeater, has_location filters, sort_by (distance/name/last_seen), limit (default 10, max 50). Added to TOOL_TRIGGER_KEYWORDS and available_tools in config.ini.example. Pre-existing test failures (23 tests) are unrelated.

userStories.title: Add unit tests for LLM SQL query tool
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for the SQL query tool to ensure security.
acceptanceCriteria: Test max limit cap is enforced
Test schema introspection returns valid DDL
userStories.notes: Created tests/commands/test_sql_query_command.py with 80 tests covering: SELECT queries, INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE rejection, DROP/ALTER rejection, limit parameter, max limit cap, and schema introspection. All tests pass. Pre-existing test failures (23 tests) are unrelated.

userStories.title: Update LLM system prompt with database context
userStories.description: As an LLM, I need the system prompt to include database schema information so I can write appropriate queries.
acceptanceCriteria: Update llm_command.py to include schema summary in system prompt
List key tables: complete_contact_tracking, message_stats, repeater_adverts, mesh_connections
Include column descriptions for important fields
Mention that LLM should choose appropriate LIMIT/ORDER BY based on question
Keep system prompt concise to not waste context
userStories.notes: Added _get_database_context() method to llm_command.py. System prompt is enhanced with database schema when data tools (sql_query, repeaters, stats) are offered. Includes all key tables with column descriptions and query guidelines. Context is ~1KB. Pre-existing test failures (23 tests) are unrelated.
